IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (26202430.pdf)
SUMMARY: Subject matter expert in HR Applications, highly effective at incorporating creative solutions to achieve business objectives and improve efficiency. Self-motivated and results-driven with strong communication, analytical, problem-solving, and reasoning skills.
SKILLS: Advanced Excel, Access, Word, Visio, Power Point, VBA, SAP HCM, Success Factors (Compensation), Microsoft Project Management, Service Now (ASKHR), Smartsheet, Panaya, SilkRoad - Red Carpet
